programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A dispute over a pair of trousers missing from a dry cleaner's ends in murder - and the ensuing investigation leads Lupo and Green to a businessman working for a shady multinational chain of department stores. Drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked car dealer whose son is dying of leukaemia presents McCoy and Ross with a moral dilemma. His ex-wife is their prime suspect - but it transpires that the victim had regularly abused her and refused to pay child support. Drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green comes under investigation by Internal Affairs after he shoots a suspect, and the case reveals a host of secrets the detective would rather keep hidden, threatening not only his police career but his freedom. Jesse L Martin stars, alongside S Epatha Merkerson and Linus Roache

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy captain is held hostage in his own office while his wife and blind daughter are abducted, and the kidnappers try to extort a large sum of money from him for his family's release. The NCIS team is soon on the case, but initially struggles to identify the chief assailant

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs investigates the discovery of a woman's mummified remains, following a trail of clues that takes him and the team to Florida, where they search for another victim who mysteriously disappeared. One of their few leads is a manual on the secret of being a good wife - which eventually points them in the direction of a serial killer

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of an ambitious architect with aspirations to design the new World Trade Centre - and discover he had a silent partner who may have been responsible for his murder. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A recuperating rape victim is abducted from hospital and later found dead, triggering an investigation that takes Benson and the team into the heart of New York's clubland - and eventually to a suspect with a juvenile conviction for assault, torture and murder. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler race to find a woman with a high-risk pregnancy who has been kidnapped as the delivery date approaches. As the pressure mounts, they find there is no shortage of suspects willing to accept responsibility for the crime. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl tests positive for a sexually transmitted disease - and the team turns to her family to trace the paedophile who abused her. However, revelations about the victim's elder sister place Cabot in a tricky situation. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Stephanie March

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An infant ingests cocaine that has been mixed into baby food but Internal Affairs blocks the investigation, so the team goes undercover to expose a drug ring run by corrupt cops. However, Cragen and Benson uncover a smuggling racket as they pursue the case

Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Sarah Moore unearths hidden gems at a recycling centre in Witley, Surrey, including a rusty petrol can and an old chest of drawers

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Car problems see James Braxton and Charles Hanson continue on foot, buying antiques in Perthshire and the Lothians and finding out about the great scientist James Clerk Maxwell

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The last leg sees James Braxton and Charles Hanson heading south over the Scottish border, taking their final purchases to auction in Berwick-Upon-Tweed in Northumberland. Charles dresses in full Highland regalia to hear how Sir Walter Scott reinvented tartan, while James discovers the story behind one of the most intriguing incidents of the Second World War. James believes silver antiques will steal him victory, but Charles plumps for a little porcelain King Charles Spaniel hoping for big profits

programme.title: My Violent Child
programme.desc: Documentary following therapist Mandy Saligari as she takes on some of the UK's most violent and difficult children, and tries to figure out what makes their behaviour so extreme. In the first edition, she heads to South Wales, where she deals with one of the most troubling cases she has ever seen. Jack is just months away from turning ten, the criminal age of responsibility, and is at risk of being locked up due to how badly he terrorises his dad. In addition to this, he has been expelled from school for attacking a pupil, so Mandy uses unconventional methods in an attempt to solve his behavioural issues

programme.title: Embarrassing Fat Bodies
programme.desc: Doctors Christian Jessen, Dawn Harper and Pixie McKenna offer medical advice to a husband and wife who have a combined weight of 52 stone, and a 21-year-old mother whose enjoyment of life is restricted by her J-cup breasts

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard browses a salvage fair by Ripley Castle, North Yorkshire. In Newcastle, he visits a dealer of mid-20th century designer furniture and later checks out an art collection in Hastings, East Sussex

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin visit a Spanish mission in Lompac, California, where visitors have reported hearing flutes and voices

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team of investigators visit Whittington Castle, Shropshire, where castle manager Sue tells them about the legends, ghost stories associated with the venue

programme.title: Walks Around Britain

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Panic (1963)
programme.desc: A jeweller's assistant is pursued by the police and a violent gang as she struggles to recall details of a shop raid in which she witnessed a murder. Drama, starring Janine Gray

programme.title: Dentist on the Job (1961)
programme.desc: Two newly qualified dentists unwittingly get involved in the invention and promotion of a new toothpaste. Comedy, starring Bob Monkhouse, Ronnie Stevens, Kenneth Connor, Shirley Eaton, Eric Barker, Richard Wattis and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: First episode of the 1970s British sci-fi series. Two interdimensional operatives with special abilities investigate strange events to protect the universe

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The team offers advice to a 19-year-old fitness instructor who claims to have never eaten a vegetable, and a woman whose menopausal hot flushes are ruining her life. Also examined is a 39-year-old photographer whose diet may be causing her spine to fuse. The results of the first Big Food Trial are announced, and Pixie McKenna investigates the reliability of do-it-yourself food-intolerance tests

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy receives a letter from school, prompting him to help Alex realise his potential. With the attention on her brother, Molly relishes the fact that her behaviour goes virtually unnoticed. Meanwhile, girlfriend Siobhan and Kev both feel neglected. Nicholas Lyndhurst stars

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Expert in foul odours Dr Geoffrey Kite eagerly anticipates the rare flowering of the mighty Titan arum, an evil-smelling bloom lasting just 24 hours. Simon and Tim Cole work against the clock to complete the badger sett and field hospital in time for Kew's Go Wild festival

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon spreads her wings and takes full advantage of her sister's hospitality, but Tracey is having money worries. Ross Kemp guest stars, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by fellow musicians for an impromptu jam session, as well as a chat about their lives in rock. In this edition he is joined by Alice Cooper

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by Stereophonics frontman Kelly Jones, who discusses some of his favourite songs, including Otis Redding's Cigarettes and Coffee and Who Killed Davey Moore? by Bob Dylan

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: The Guvnors (2014)
programme.desc: A conflict erupts between two generations of criminals in a rough London neighbourhood. When the sadistic young leader of a gang brutally attacks a former football hooligan, it inspires one of his old friends to get his firm back together and get revenge. Crime thriller, starring Doug Allen, Harley Sylvester and Vas Blackwood

programme.title: The Statue (1971)
programme.desc: A linguist's wife sculpts a nude statue of him to celebrate his achievements. However, when she grows weary of his neglect, she reveals that its impressive physique was modelled on another man. Convinced she has taken a lover, he sets out to identify the man behind the sculpture. Comedy, starring David Niven, Virna Lisi and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Raw recruits Jamie and Alex get their first taste of life in the SAS during an exercise using live ammunition, before being thrown in at the deep end on an operation to end a bank siege. Charismatic Sergeant Henry 'Henno' Garvie and his crack team must save the hostages as well as themselves. Military drama, starring Ross Kemp, Jamie Draven and Sendhil Ramamurthy

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: A drunk John Hurt arrives in the neighbourhood, while Joe takes advantage of Michael's absence by taking over his house. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Shaw Somers, Lucy Jones and Dr Giovanni Miletto give advice to a 42-year-old woman who has been eliminating entire food groups from her diet in an effort to combat her traumatising fish odour syndrome. They also help a teenager who worries severe eczema will prevent him fulfilling his dream of becoming an aeroplane cabin crew member. Three hard-drinking students from Leeds put hangover cures to the test, and Dr Pixie McKenna investigates the veracity of health claims made on food packaging

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.desc: The king wants to demolish the village and build a palace on the site, leaving the vikings homeless

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which the same 30 players compete for a daily prize of up to £1,500 and the chance to win £10,000. Every right answer takes them a step closer to a shot at that jackpot - but a single 'impossible' answer knocks them out for the day

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Boxer David Haye and I'm a Celebrity 2013 winner Kian Egan set out to complete a series of fiendishly difficult challenges, ranging from agility tests to skill trials, with the aim of winning a jackpot of £250,000 for charity. The more money they stand to win, the harder the task in front of them, but having both experienced the horrors of Bushtucker Trials, will they find it easier than most to hold their nerve? Phillip Schofield presents

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a writers special edition of the general knowledge quiz. Contestants are Richard Madeley, Dreda Say Mitchell, John O'Farrell, Lise Mayer, Jenny Colgan, Jane Fallon, Richard Stilgoe and Don Black

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as players Daniel, Liz, Mike and Barbara pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Comedian Russell Kane and former EastEnders star Rita Simons (Roxy Mitchell) take part in the game show, teaming up with their relatives to guess the answers to surveys of 100 people in a bid to reach the final round, in which they can win up to £30,000 for their chosen charities. Vernon Kay hosts

programme.title: Fight Night
programme.desc: Carl Froch v George Groves. Another chance to see the bout for the WBA and IBF Super Middleweight titles, held at the Phones 4u Arena in Manchester. Froch avenged one of only two career defeats when outpointing Mikkel Kessler in his previous fight, and his greater experience at the highest level meant he went into this contest as the favourite. However, he could not afford to take Groves lightly, as the man 11 years his junior entered the match with an unblemished professional record

programme.title: Fight Night International
programme.desc: Carl Froch v Andre Ward. Another chance to see the Super Six final at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, where the WBC and WBA Super Middleweight titles were also on the line. Nottingham's Froch bounced back from his sole career loss on points to Mikkel Kessler to reach this final by winning decisions against Arthur Abraham and Glen Johnson. However, the Cobra faced a difficult task against the American, who was unbeaten in his 24 professional bouts and won light heavyweight gold at the 2004 Olympics

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
